page_metadata.biotools__summary: A novel computational approach for predicting miRNA targets with the target sites located along entire gene sequences, which permits finding additional targets that are not located in the 3′ un-translated regions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A novel computational approach for predicting miRNA targets with the target sites located along entire gene sequences, which permits finding additional targets that are not located in the 3′ un-translated regions.
